summary: Iteration 164 - Phase 3 Gallery & Showcase Verification COMPLETE. Backend: 25/25 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All features verified working including the CRITICAL fix - Gallery remix flow now correctly prefills Story Video Studio via localStorage. Gallery loads 30 videos with presigned URLs, leaderboard shows 5 items with rank badges, category filters and sort options work, preview modal functional, mobile responsive carousel works.

issues: Cookie consent banner appears on page load - must be dismissed to interact with lower content (expected behavior)

gallery_backend_api.GET /api/pipeline/gallery/leaderboard: PASS - Returns 5 items with presigned URLs
gallery_backend_api.GET /api/pipeline/gallery/categories: PASS - Returns All(30), 2D Cartoon(14), Watercolor(9), Anime(4), Comic Book(2), Claymation(1)

gallery_frontend_ui.Most Remixed Leaderboard: PASS - 5 items with #1-#5 rank badges, remix counts, remix buttons
gallery_frontend_ui.Leaderboard Thumbnails: PASS - Images load with presigned URLs
gallery_frontend_ui.Category Filters: PASS - All, 2D Cartoon, Watercolor, Anime, Comic Book, Claymation buttons work
gallery_frontend_ui.Watercolor Filter: PASS - Click reduces grid from 30 to 9 cards
gallery_frontend_ui.Sort Options: PASS - Newest, Trending, Most Remixed buttons work
gallery_frontend_ui.Thumbnail Images: PASS - All load correctly (presigned URLs working)
gallery_frontend_ui.Preview Modal: PASS - Opens on click, shows video player, title, Remix and Close buttons
gallery_frontend_ui.Mobile Responsive: PASS - Horizontal carousel for leaderboard (overflow-x: auto) on 375px
gallery_frontend_ui.Bottom CTA: PASS - 'Start Creating' and 'View Plans' buttons visible

gallery_remix_flow_CRITICAL_FIX.Click Remix (logged in): PASS - Sets localStorage.remix_data and navigates to /app/story-video-studio
gallery_remix_flow_CRITICAL_FIX.Story Video Studio prefill: PASS - Title='Remix: [title]', Story text prefilled from gallery video, Animation style preserved
gallery_remix_flow_CRITICAL_FIX.Remix Banner: PASS - Shows 'Remixing: [title] — edit the story and make it your own!'
gallery_remix_flow_CRITICAL_FIX.localStorage transport: PASS - remix_data correctly stored with prompt, remixFrom.title, remixFrom.settings

regression_tests.Dashboard: PASS - Welcome message, universal prompt, hero cards, inspiration templates, recent creations, sidebar panels
regression_tests.Story Video Studio: PASS - 'Create a Story Video' page loads
regression_tests.Reel Generator: PASS - Page loads with reel generation form
regression_tests.Photo to Comic: PASS - 'Convert Photos To Comic Character' page loads
regression_tests.GIF Maker: PASS - 'Photo Reaction GIF Creator' page loads
regression_tests.Bedtime Story Builder: PASS - 'Create Magical Bedtime Stories' page loads
regression_tests.Comic Storybook: PASS - 'Comic Story Book Builder' page loads
regression_tests.Profile Page: PASS - My Space tab with stats, downloads section, generated content, in progress jobs
regression_tests.Login/Logout: PASS - Test user login works, token stored in localStorage
regression_tests.Engagement Dashboard API: PASS - Returns challenge, streak, level data

critical_code_review_comments: Gallery.js: localStorage.setItem('remix_data') correctly implemented at line 84 before navigate()
Gallery.js: Auth check at lines 52-56 redirects unauthenticated users to signup with redirect param
StoryVideoPipeline.js: Correctly reads localStorage.getItem('remix_data') at lines 91-107
StoryVideoPipeline.js: Sets title, storyText, animStyle, ageGroup, voicePreset from remix_data.remixFrom.settings
pipeline_routes.py: _make_presigned_url() correctly wraps all gallery output_url and thumbnail_url
All presigned URLs contain X-Amz-Signature for secure direct access

success_rate.frontend: 100% (All gallery features, remix flow, and regression tests passed)

seed_data_creation: None - used existing 30 showcase items in pipeline_jobs collection
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 3 Gallery & Showcase is fully verified. The CRITICAL bug from iteration 163 (story text not prefilled) is now FIXED - localStorage is used as primary transport for remix data. Gallery is public (no auth required), but remix tracking requires auth. Cookie consent banner appears on all pages and must be dismissed. Test user has 1,000,014 credits. All 7 tool pages load correctly. Profile page has some CSP issues with http:// API calls but content renders correctly.

rca_of_previous_issue.issue: Gallery remix story text not prefilled (iteration 163)
rca_of_previous_issue.root_cause: React Router v7 changed how navigation state is handled - useLocation().state was returning null
rca_of_previous_issue.fix_applied: Gallery.js now stores remix_data in localStorage BEFORE navigate(). StoryVideoPipeline.js reads from localStorage on mount.
rca_of_previous_issue.verification: Confirmed working - Title prefilled as 'Remix: [title]', Story text contains original video's story_text, Animation style preserved
